use serde_json::Value;

// BAD: chained indexing without type checks
fn get_user_name(data: &Value) -> String {
    data["user"]["name"].as_str().unwrap().to_string()
}

fn get_nested_value(data: &Value) -> String {
    data["response"]["data"]["items"][0]["value"]
        .as_str()
        .unwrap_or("")
        .to_string()
}

fn process_config(config: &Value) {
    let port = config["server"]["port"].as_u64().unwrap() as u16;
    let host = config["server"]["host"].as_str().unwrap();
    let max_conn = config["database"]["max_connections"].as_u64().unwrap() as u32;
}
